source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A uniform thin rigid rod of mass $M$ is supported by two rapidly rotating rollers, whose axes are separated by a fixed distance $a$. The rod is initially placed at rest asymmetrically, as shown in Fig. 1.114. Now consider the case in which the directions of rotation of the rollers are reversed, as shown in Fig. 1.115. Calculate the displacement $x(t)$, again assuming $x(0)=x_{0}$ and $\dot{x}(0)=0$.
extraction_notes: images field contains a PIL image object description rather than a concrete file path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object description rather than a concrete file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式引用 Fig. 1.114 和 Fig. 1.115，并要求处理 rollers 反向转动后的情形，关键设定依赖示意图。
输入字段给出 requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明题目不是纯文本可完整承载。
题干中的 'initially placed at rest asymmetrically, as shown' 这类空间/构型信息通常需要图像才能准确定义。
multi_step: 要求求解 x(t) 而非单一数值，通常涉及受力分析、建立运动方程、再结合初始条件求解。
答案包含 cosh 形式和参数 omega，表明过程不止一步代入，而是需要推导微分方程并求其解析解。
图示构型与文字条件需要联合使用，具有一定多模态、多步推理潜力。
verifiability: 答案是明确的解析表达式，包含 x(t) 和 omega 的定义，输出形式清晰。
给出了初始条件 x(0)=x0, x_dot(0)=0，可用于检查答案是否满足条件。
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，且题干与答案都存在，便于后续规则核验或符号比对。

candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A uniform thin rigid rod of mass $M$ is supported by two rapidly rotating rollers, whose axes are separated by a fixed distance $a$. The rod is initially placed at rest asymmetrically, as shown in Fig. 1.114. Now consider the case in which the directions of rotation of the rollers are reversed, as shown in Fig. 1.115. Calculate the displacement $x(t)$, again assuming $x(0)=x_{0}$ and $\dot{x}(0)=0$.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: images field contains a PIL image object description rather than a concrete file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain: With the directions of rotation of the rollers reversed, the friction forces also reverse directions and we have $M\ddot{x}=f_{2}-f_{1}$, or $\ddot{\xi}=\frac{2\mu g}{a}\xi$, where $\xi=2x-a$. The motion is no longer simple harmonic. With the same initial conditions, the solution is $\xi=\left(x_{0}-\frac{a}{2}\right)\left(e^{-\omega t}+e^{\omega t}\right)=\left(2x_{0}-a\right)\cosh(\omega t)$, i.e. $x=\left(x_{0}-\frac{a}{2}\right)\cosh(\omega t)+\frac{a}{2}$, where $\omega=\sqrt{\frac{2\mu}{a}}$. Note that if $x_{0}\neq\frac{a}{2}$, the rod will move in one direction until it loses contact with one roller.

problem_main_record.reasoning_chain: With the directions of rotation of the rollers reversed, the friction forces also reverse directions and we have $M\ddot{x}=f_{2}-f_{1}$, or $\ddot{\xi}=\frac{2\mu g}{a}\xi$, where $\xi=2x-a$. The motion is no longer simple harmonic. With the same initial conditions, the solution is $\xi=\left(x_{0}-\frac{a}{2}\right)\left(e^{-\omega t}+e^{\omega t}\right)=\left(2x_{0}-a\right)\cosh(\omega t)$, i.e. $x=\left(x_{0}-\frac{a}{2}\right)\cosh(\omega t)+\frac{a}{2}$, where $\omega=\sqrt{\frac{2\mu}{a}}$. Note that if $x_{0}\neq\frac{a}{2}$, the rod will move in one direction until it loses contact with one roller.
